message:
fix(for-you): correct import path and improve empty-state UX copy

- Fix import from @jeffreysprompts/core/prompts to /prompts/registry
  to match the actual module export path
- Clarify filter explanation: "Timeframe filters your view-history
  signals; category filters which prompts are shown"
- Improve empty-state message to suggest widening preferences or
  changing the category instead of generic "browse a few prompts"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
